response:
Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
The model is packaged into a container and uploaded to an S3 bucket for storage. * * *  
Model overfitting may occur if the training data is not sufficiently diverse. * * *  
Data security is prioritized by encrypting data at rest and in transit. * * *  
The model is deployed as a Lambda function or EC2 instance. * * *  
Overfitting can be mitigated by using regularization techniques. * * *  
AWS provides tools for monitoring and logging to track performance. * * *  
Data breaches are prevented through strict access controls and IAM policies. * * *  
The model is scaled using Auto Scaling and load balancing. * * *  
Security vulnerabilities are addressed with regular audits and updates. * * *
